channel.title: Life on OSGbyte
channel.description: Recent content in Life on OSGbyte

item.title: How are we shaped through the points on our paths?
item.description: Recently, I’ve become intrigued by how the paths we choose in life shape both our self-perception and how others perceive us. The book that sparked this interest for me was Surrounded by Idiots. Its main goal is to help readers understand why some people behave in ways that may seem irrational from our perspective. A great example is the contrast between entrepreneurs and those who prefer a traditional 9-to-5 job. It’s not about one path being better than the other—it’s about recognizing that people have different values, priorities, and perspectives on life.
